svg.title: UNet-FNO architecture
svg.desc: U-Net encoder-decoder with a Fourier Neural Operator bottleneck replacing the convolutional stack; each FNO layer performs FFT, truncates to the lowest modes, multiplies by learnable complex weights, and inverse-transforms before a pointwise linear skip and GELU.
svg.text: UNet-FNO — Fourier Neural Operator bottleneck with attention-gated skips
